mapper.select: SELECT B.ANN_NO AS "annNo" , B.TTL AS "ttl" , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RENT_LISTING WHERE ANN_NO = B.ANN_NO) AS "supplyCnt" , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APLCT WHERE ANN_NO = B.ANN_NO) AS "applicantCnt" , NVL(ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APLCT WHERE ANN_NO = B.ANN_NO) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RENT_LISTING WHERE ANN_NO = B.ANN_NO), 0) * 100, 2), 0) AS "rate" FROM CENTER_ANN_BOARD_POST B WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN B.RCRT_BGNG_DT AND B.RCRT_END_DT;
